title: Kontrola upgrade při startu session
goal: Trigger the latest-version background refresh on every new Claude Code session start (detected via the session_id in the status payload), in addition to the existing 5-hour TTL refresh that covers long-running sessions; rate-limit the trigger so a failing fetch can't spawn a refresh on every status-line render.

steps.title: Refresh trigger state + decision
steps.detail: In versionCheck.ts add a trigger sidecar (readTrigger/writeTrigger holding {sessionId, triggeredAt}) and a pure shouldRefresh(cache, trigger, sessionId, now) that returns true for a new session, otherwise per the 5h TTL, gated by a short retry cooldown so a failing fetch cannot fire on every render. Unit tests for the decision matrix.

steps.title: Statusline fires on session start
steps.detail: Add session_id to StatusInput; the statusline command reads the trigger marker, decides via shouldRefresh, and on a positive decision spawns the detached check-version refresh and writes the marker (with the current session id). Falls back to TTL-only behaviour when session_id is absent. Verify the wiring.

steps.title: README and CHANGELOG
steps.detail: Document that the upgrade check refreshes on every new Claude Code session start, with the 5h TTL covering long-running sessions; add an English CHANGELOG entry.

autoCommit.subject: Phase 96: Kontrola upgrade při startu session
